title: hieracium ochroleucum subsp. sieberi
intro: Hieracium ochroleucum subsp. sieberi, also known as Hieracium sieberi, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly found in Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Hieracium sieberi include reducing inflammation and improving liver function, as well as its potential in treating various gastrointestinal issues. Hieracium sieberi is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although other herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules may also be available, although the latter should be used under medical supervision.
